comment.body:
Now this is interesting...
coding fair value for SPX ATM calls and puts (without taking into accoutn the implied skewness), the code says the calls are trading for 26.7% IV while the puts are trading for 13.69% IV
roughly twice the IV!
If I take the implied skewness and kurtosis into account, I get a way  closer value, saying puts are trading closer to fair value than calls.
The positioning is right-tailish, but the pricing is left-tailish...
